name: South Carolina National Guard
description_short: The South Carolina National Guard is a state military organization, not a consumer finance company. The website is inaccessible for profile purposes.
description_long: The South Carolina National Guard (SCNG) is the state-based military force serving South Carolina, operating under dual federal and state authority. It is not a consumer finance provider, lending company, or credit service organization. The entity's primary mission is military readiness, emergency response, and state defense operations. The official website (scguard.ng.mil) is currently inaccessible due to server configuration, preventing verification of any financial services. No evidence exists that SCNG offers payday alternatives, personal loans, emergency cash advances, credit counseling, or any consumer finance products. The miscategorization as a "payday-alternatives" provider appears to be a data entry error. Military members and their families may have access to Military OneSource (a DoD benefit) or Armed Forces Financial Network resources, but these are separate from the National Guard organization itself. Any financial assistance programs for military personnel would fall under employee benefits, not consumer lending. Without accessible website content, no legitimate consumer finance profile can be constructed.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000
Low-income designated — may offer Payday Alternative Loans (PALs)
cons: Website is completely inaccessible, preventing verification of any offered services
Organization is not a consumer finance provider and should not be listed in lending categories

best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: This profile entry appears to be an error. The South Carolina National Guard is a military organization, not a consumer finance company, and should not be listed on a consumer finance platform. The website access denial prevents any legitimate assessment of offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
